metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_2322
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Immunoparticles for Netrin-G1 were mostly detected in the presynaptic active zone membrane of dendritic spines in SR.

2/1/2018 Pim
- Literal: "Excitatory asymmetric synapses immunolabeled with netrin-G1 and netrin-G2 antibodies were detected in the SLM and SR, respectively (Fig. 1D)"...."Netrin-G1 and netrin-G2 immunoparticles had peak radial distances within the first external bin from the presynaptic membrane (i.e., within the synaptic cleft)" ... "These findings indicate that netrin-Gs are presynaptic proteins and NGLs are postsynaptic proteins." Note: 'SR' means 'CA1 stratum radiatum'
- Based on the known lipid anchor of the protein, the "anchored component of ... membrane" term was chosen.. Experimental description: Materials and Methods
Electron microscopy
For post-embedding iEM, adult mice were deeply anesthetized.
